narrative:
Union North (precinct in Fayette County) has 647 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
